creator: graham@gwsoft.co.uk
text:
Compile of mod_php4 fails.

Appears to fail at precompile level while applying patches to configure.

Ports tree is clean and updated to latest using cvsup.

How-To-Repeat: > cd /usr/ports/www/mod_php4
> make all

Select following options

GD
Zlib
Mcrypt
Mhash
Pdflib
IMAP
Mysql
Openssl
Xml
ftp
gettext
iconv
mbregex
mbstring
sockets
transsid

===>  Extracting for mod_php4-4.0.6_4
